pydantic-field-no-patch.schema_version: per-file JSON schema version marker; not a firmware config value
pydantic-field-no-patch.mm_per_tick: derived host-side after load from wheel geometry; never stored or pushed
pydantic-field-no-patch.identity.*: host-side robot identity metadata (name/uid/hardware model/drivetrain type); never a wire config verb
pydantic-field-no-patch.connection.*: host-side device-discovery/announcement bookkeeping; never a wire config verb
pydantic-field-no-patch.vision.*: host-side camera/AprilTag geometry, consumed entirely host-side by the vision/goto stack; never pushed to firmware
pydantic-field-no-patch.geometry.drive_axle_offset_mm.*: host-side lever-arm geometry for camera/goto math; never a wire config verb
pydantic-field-no-patch.geometry.odometry_offset_mm.*: OTOS lever-arm offset — OTOS ignores REG_OFFSET writes so this is host-side-only (see .clasi/knowledge/otos-offset-register-unwritable.md), pushed via the OI/OL/OA verbs, not the 096 Patch surface
pydantic-field-no-patch.geometry.odometry_chip_upside_down: construction-time HAL wiring flag (mirrors the pre-096 Config.h-era odomUpsideDown allowlist entry: 'runtime SET would not re-init the sensor')
pydantic-field-no-patch.geometry.otos_untrusted: per-robot OTOS-mounting fact (104-005, clasi/issues/rig-persistent-otos-distrust.md); host-side-only until sprint 106's host fusion reads it, no wire config verb
pydantic-field-no-patch.geometry.wheelbase_mm: mecanum-only geometry; the 096 curated Patch surface covers only the differential trackwidth key (tw)
pydantic-field-no-patch.wheels.*: host-side wheel geometry used to derive mm_per_tick; not a Patch field itself
pydantic-field-no-patch.encoders.*: host-side capability/count flags; never a wire config verb
pydantic-field-no-patch.drive.*: host-side motion-limit/crawl-mode tuning consumed entirely by rogo/camera_goto; never pushed via SET
pydantic-field-no-patch.gripper.*: host-side gripper geometry/capability flag; no wire config verb
pydantic-field-no-patch.peripherals.laser_port: host-side port-wiring description; no wire config verb
pydantic-field-no-patch.calibration.otos_angular_scale: pushed via the OI/OL/OA verbs (int8 scalar register write), not the 096 Patch surface
pydantic-field-no-patch.calibration.otos_linear_scale: pushed via the OI/OL/OA verbs (int8 scalar register write), not the 096 Patch surface
pydantic-field-no-patch.calibration.rotation_gain: host-side open-loop turn-correction model consumed by rogo's `_turn_command`; not a firmware wire field
pydantic-field-no-patch.calibration.rotation_offset_deg: host-side open-loop turn-correction model consumed by rogo's `_turn_command`; not a firmware wire field
pydantic-field-no-patch.calibration.rotation_gain_neg: host-side open-loop turn-correction model consumed by rogo's `_turn_command`; not a firmware wire field
pydantic-field-no-patch.calibration.rotation_offset_deg_neg: host-side open-loop turn-correction model consumed by rogo's `_turn_command`; not a firmware wire field
pydantic-field-no-patch.control.vel_filt: stale pre-096 wire key (`vel.filt`) — not present in config_commands.cpp's current 15-key kAllKeys table; pre-existing drift in host/robot_radio/io/cli.py's push_calibration(), tracked separately from this ticket
pydantic-field-no-patch.control.sync: stale pre-096 wire key (`sync`) — not present in config_commands.cpp's current 15-key kAllKeys table; pre-existing drift in host/robot_radio/io/cli.py's push_calibration(), tracked separately from this ticket
pydantic-field-no-patch.control.min_wheel_mms: stale pre-096 wire key (`minWheelMms`) — not present in config_commands.cpp's current 15-key kAllKeys table; pre-existing drift in host/robot_radio/io/cli.py's push_calibration(), tracked separately from this ticket
pydantic-field-no-patch.control.turn_gate: stale pre-096 wire key (`turnGate`) — not present in config_commands.cpp's current 15-key kAllKeys table; pre-existing drift in host/robot_radio/io/cli.py's push_calibration(), tracked separately from this ticket
pydantic-field-no-patch.control.yaw_rate_max: stale pre-096 wire key (`yawRateMax`) — not present in config_commands.cpp's current 15-key kAllKeys table; pre-existing drift in host/robot_radio/io/cli.py's push_calibration(), tracked separately from this ticket
pydantic-field-no-patch.control.max_rot_accel_dps2: explicitly documented in its own field comment as host-only, NOT pushed to firmware
pydantic-field-no-patch.calibration.fwd_sign_left: 113-004: Tier-2 boot-only (gen_boot_config.py's fwd_sign_for_ports()); no live SET key, baked at build/sim-open time only
pydantic-field-no-patch.calibration.fwd_sign_right: 113-004: Tier-2 boot-only (gen_boot_config.py's fwd_sign_for_ports()); no live SET key, baked at build/sim-open time only
pydantic-field-no-patch.control.heading_source: 113-004: Tier-2 boot-only (gen_boot_config.py's heading_source_for_config()); no live SET key (109-005's own per-robot policy override is boot-time only)
pydantic-field-no-patch.control.heading_lead_bias: 113-004: Tier-2 boot-only (gen_boot_config.py's lead_compensation_for_config()); no live SET key (109-010)
pydantic-field-no-patch.control.plan_lead: 113-004: Tier-2 boot-only (gen_boot_config.py's lead_compensation_for_config()); no live SET key (109-010)
pydantic-field-no-patch.control.terminal_lead: 113-004: Tier-2 boot-only (gen_boot_config.py's lead_compensation_for_config()); no live SET key (109-010)
pydantic-field-no-patch.control.actuation_lag: 113-004: Tier-2 boot-only (gen_boot_config.py's actuation_lag_for_config()); no live SET key (112-002)
pydantic-field-no-patch.control.distance_tol: 113-004: Tier-2 boot-only (gen_boot_config.py's distance_gains_for_config()); no live SET key (112-003) -- distance_kp used to be the live sibling (PlannerConfigPatch.distance_kp) until 115-003 deleted PlannerConfigPatch wholesale; see control.distance_kp's own entry below
pydantic-field-no-patch.control.model_tau_lin: 113-004: Tier-2 boot-only (gen_boot_config.py's model_tau_for_config()); no live SET key (sprint 113 Design Rationale Decision 4)
pydantic-field-no-patch.control.model_tau_ang: 113-004: Tier-2 boot-only (gen_boot_config.py's model_tau_for_config()); no live SET key (sprint 113 Design Rationale Decision 4)
pydantic-field-no-patch.control.heading_dwell_tol_deg: 114-002: Tier-2 boot-only (gen_boot_config.py's heading_dwell_for_config()); no live SET key -- added to ControlConfig so calibration/sim_boot_config.py's RobotConfig->dict conversion stays lossless, mirrors control.heading_lead_bias's own reasoning
pydantic-field-no-patch.control.heading_dwell_rate_dps: 114-002: Tier-2 boot-only (gen_boot_config.py's heading_dwell_for_config()); no live SET key -- same reasoning as control.heading_dwell_tol_deg above
pydantic-field-no-patch.control.a_max: 114-002: Tier-2 boot-only (gen_boot_config.py's motion_limits_for_config(), sprint 114 -- previously the module DEFAULT constant with no JSON mapping at all); no live SET key. decel-into-the-goal campaign (2026-07-22): read again by gen_boot_config.py's shaper_config_for_config() (Motion::VelocityShaper) and now ALSO live-tunable via EstimatorConfigPatch.a_max -- but this script only tracks DrivetrainConfigPatch/MotorConfigPatch (its own module docstring's documented scope; EstimatorConfigPatch is a pre-existing untracked gap, same as OtosConfigPatch), so this entry stays allowlisted here regardless.
pydantic-field-no-patch.control.a_decel: 114-002: Tier-2 boot-only (gen_boot_config.py's motion_limits_for_config()); no live SET key -- same reasoning as control.a_max above. decel-into-the-goal campaign: same EstimatorConfigPatch.a_decel live-tune note as control.a_max above.
pydantic-field-no-patch.control.alpha_max: decel-into-the-goal campaign (2026-07-22): Motion::VelocityShaper's own angular accel-ramp ceiling, a_max's own new angular sibling (no msg::PlannerConfig predecessor). Tier-2 boot-only (gen_boot_config.py's shaper_config_for_config()) plus live-tunable via EstimatorConfigPatch.alpha_max -- same 'this script doesn't track EstimatorConfigPatch' reasoning as control.a_max above.
pydantic-field-no-patch.control.alpha_decel: decel-into-the-goal campaign: Motion::VelocityShaper's own angular decel-taper ceiling, a_decel's own new angular sibling. Same Tier-2-boot-only/EstimatorConfigPatch.alpha_decel reasoning as control.alpha_max above.
pydantic-field-no-patch.control.v_body_max: 114-002: Tier-2 boot-only (gen_boot_config.py's motion_limits_for_config()); no live SET key -- same reasoning as control.a_max above
pydantic-field-no-patch.control.j_max: 114-002: Tier-2 boot-only (gen_boot_config.py's motion_limits_for_config()); no live SET key -- same reasoning as control.a_max above. Jerk-limited S-curve stage (2026-07-22): read again by gen_boot_config.py's shaper_config_for_config() (Motion::VelocityShaper) and now ALSO live-tunable via EstimatorConfigPatch.j_max -- same 'this script doesn't track EstimatorConfigPatch' reasoning as control.a_max's own updated entry.
pydantic-field-no-patch.control.yaw_jerk_max: 114-002: Tier-2 boot-only (gen_boot_config.py's motion_limits_for_config()); no live SET key -- same reasoning as control.a_max above. Jerk-limited S-curve stage: same EstimatorConfigPatch.yaw_jerk_max live-tune note as control.j_max above.
pydantic-field-no-patch.control.min_speed: 115-003: was PlannerConfigPatch.min_speed (113-003), a live SET key, until gut-to-minimal-firmware S1 motion-stack excision deleted PlannerConfigPatch wholesale (App::Pilot, its own consumer, is gone too); no wire Patch field left to map to at all
pydantic-field-no-patch.control.heading_kp: 115-003: was PlannerConfigPatch.heading_kp (098-005), a live SET key, until gut-to-minimal-firmware S1 motion-stack excision deleted PlannerConfigPatch wholesale; no wire Patch field left to map to at all
pydantic-field-no-patch.control.heading_kd: 115-003: was PlannerConfigPatch.heading_kd (098-005), a live SET key, until gut-to-minimal-firmware S1 motion-stack excision deleted PlannerConfigPatch wholesale; no wire Patch field left to map to at all
pydantic-field-no-patch.control.distance_kp: 115-003: was PlannerConfigPatch.distance_kp (112-003), a live SET key, until gut-to-minimal-firmware S1 motion-stack excision deleted PlannerConfigPatch wholesale; no wire Patch field left to map to at all
pydantic-field-no-patch.control.arrive_dwell: 115-003: was PlannerConfigPatch.arrive_dwell (100-001), a live SET key, until gut-to-minimal-firmware S1 motion-stack excision deleted PlannerConfigPatch wholesale; no wire Patch field left to map to at all
